description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched gable roof clad in dark slate-like material. The exterior walls are finished in light gray brick, providing a clean and contemporary appearance. Large, rectangular windows dominate the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior and offering clear views from multiple sides. The front includes a single, understated entry door and a combination of wide and tall windows, while the rear showcases expansive floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sides featuring narrow vertical windows and others broad horizontal panes. The overall structure is two stories tall, with no visible decorative elements or overhangs, emphasizing simplicity and function.
description: A modern two-story house with light gray brick walls, a dark gable roof, and large asymmetrical windows. The design is minimalist, featuring expansive glass panels and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: The front view shows a single entry door, a large horizontal window above, and a wide window beside the door, all set in light gray brick.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a tall, narrow vertical window and a large window below, with minimal detailing and a continuous brick surface.
description_view_2: The opposite end displays a large upper window and a wide lower window, with a clean brick facade and no entryway.
description_view_3: The rear view features expansive floor-to-ceiling glass panels and multiple large windows, maximizing light and visibility.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or overhang, integrated into the brick facade with minimal ornamentation
